info.description: Defines the rules for awarding affiliate points on specific platform events

name.description: Human-readable rule name, e.g. 'Ride Completion Flat Bonus'

eventType.description: Which platform event triggers this rule

isEnabled.description: Toggle individual rules without deleting them

rewardType.description: flat = fixed points regardless of fare; percentage = points proportional to fare

value.description: For flat: number of points. For percentage: % of fare converted to points (e.g. 10 = 10%)
